description: Visual aesthetics keyed by id (referenced from GENRE_KNOWLEDGE_BASE.json#video_aesthetic_id). Each entry specifies the cinematic look — palette, lighting, camera, motion — and is consumable by both the canvas renderer and prompt-based image/video models.

_field_doc.lighting: key | rim | low-key | high-key | gel | natural | strobe | volumetric
_field_doc.camera_archetype: static | push-in | track | crane | handheld | dolly | drone
_field_doc.lens_feel: wide | normal | telephoto | macro | anamorphic | fisheye
_field_doc.texture_overlay: vinyl | tape | crt | clean | film | grain
_field_doc.ai_image_keywords: comma-separable keywords to feed image / video generators
_field_doc.transitions_preferred: list of transition ids from VIDEO_SYNCH_ENGINE.md §10

festival-stage-laser.label: Festival Stage with Lasers
festival-stage-laser.ai_image_keywords: EDM festival main stage, laser lights, fog machine, massive crowd silhouette, neon visuals, stadium-scale lighting design, hyper-saturated, low angle hero shot

warm-club-grain.label: Warm Club, Film Grain
warm-club-grain.ai_image_keywords: intimate basement club, warm tungsten lights, smoke, dancers in soft focus, 35mm film grain, deep shadows, vinyl-warm color, late-night

industrial-monochrome.label: Industrial Monochrome (Berlin)
industrial-monochrome.ai_image_keywords: industrial concrete warehouse, single overhead light, monochrome black and white, dancers as silhouettes, brutalist architecture, fog, harsh shadows, Berlin techno club aesthetic

ethereal-aurora.label: Ethereal Aurora
ethereal-aurora.ai_image_keywords: aurora borealis sky, mountain silhouettes, ethereal mist, glowing particles, deep blue and violet gradient, cinematic widescreen, volumetric godrays

glitch-electric.label: Glitch / Electric Distortion
glitch-electric.ai_image_keywords: datamosh, RGB chromatic aberration, scan lines, glitch art, VHS tracking errors, distorted faces, hot pink and electric green, abstract digital chaos

neon-night-city.label: Neon Night City
neon-night-city.ai_image_keywords: rain-slicked city street at night, neon signs, reflections in puddles, motion blur of cars, anamorphic lens flares, Bladerunner aesthetic, hot pink and cyan

london-grayscale.label: London Grayscale (UK Drill)
london-grayscale.ai_image_keywords: South London council estate, overcast gray sky, balaclava silhouettes, brutalist architecture, fish-eye lens, monochrome, gritty documentary feel

drift-night.label: Drift Night (Phonk)
drift-night.ai_image_keywords: Tokyo drift street, JDM cars sliding sideways, smoke, red taillights, glowing tire marks, VHS distortion, mountain pass at night, headlights as god-rays

vinyl-grain-90s.label: 90s Boom Bap (Vinyl Grain)
vinyl-grain-90s.ai_image_keywords: 1990s NYC street corner, sepia-toned, MPC sampler, vinyl records, brownstone stoop, hip-hop crew, Polaroid feel, warm grain, golden hour, documentary photography

lofi-bedroom-rainy.label: Lo-fi Bedroom (Rainy)
lofi-bedroom-rainy.ai_image_keywords: anime-style bedroom with rain on window, vinyl records, plants, warm tungsten lamp, tape grain, Studio Ghibli atmosphere, slow zoom, contemplative, study session vibe

neon-grid-sunset.label: Synthwave Neon Grid
neon-grid-sunset.ai_image_keywords: 1980s synthwave aesthetic, infinite neon grid floor, retrowave sunset with palm trees, magenta and cyan, chrome car driving toward sunset, Tron-style, vaporwave
